name: ai-fashion-copilot
description: AI Fashion Copilot — real recommender: React + TS backend (DuckDB, local Ollama) + Python OR-Tools CP-SAT solver.

scripts.build: npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace shared run typecheck && npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace backend run test -- --run && npm run test:solver
